/usr/bin/ar qc libipc_core.a CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/chain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/visualization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/broad_phase/bvh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/step_filter/ccd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/step_filter/trust_region.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/initial_guess/trivial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/initial_guess/affine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/initial_guess/ccd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/initial_guess/trust_region.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ipc_core.dir/src/solver.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libipc_core.a
